violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
Restaurant pickled collard greens were observed in the 1-door cooler past 7 days. PIC discarded collard greens. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
Inspector observed single service items stored on the floor in the outdoor shed. Items must be stored at least 6 inches off the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice. PIC placed a colander in ice well to serve ice for customers. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outdoor shed. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The floors in the kitchen and bar areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
